channel.title: clash on Whatever blog
channel.description: Recent content in clash on Whatever blog

item.title: debian搭建clash的透明代理(Tproxy)(nftables转发)
item.description: ref debian搭建clash的透明代理(Tproxy)(iptables转发)https://dsunn.github.io/blog/post/clash/ 本篇对上述用iptables来转发局域网流量到clash的方法, 用linux内置的nftables来代替. 修改/etc/nftables.conf, 在其最后加入下列设置. 1table inet clash 2delete table inet clash 3 4table inet clash { 5 set local_addr { 6 type ipv4_addr 7 flags interval 8 elements = { 9 10.0.0.0/8, 10 127.0.0.0/8, 11 169.254.0.0/16, 12 172.16.0.0/12, 13 192.168.0.0/16, 14 240.0.0.0/4, 15 0.0.0.0/8 16 } 17 } 18 19 set clashhost_addr { 20 type ipv4_addr 21 flags interval 22 elements = { 23 192.168.10.89/32 24 } 25 } 26 27 chain clash-tproxy { 28 ip daddr @local_addr return 29 ip daddr @clashhost_addr return 30 meta l4proto { tcp, udp } meta mark set 1 tproxy to :7893 accept 31 } 32 33 chain clash-mark { 34 ip daddr @local_addr return 35 ip daddr @clashhost_addr return 36 meta mark set 1 37 } 38 39 chain mangle-prerouting { 40 type filter hook prerouting priority mangle; policy accept; 41 meta l4proto { tcp, udp } ct direction original jump clash-tproxy 42 } 在系统上使能nftables

item.title: debian搭建clash的透明代理(Tproxy)(iptables转发)
item.description: 修改于9/20/2023 一. clash程序 root运行 下载clash premium (https://github.com/Dreamacro/clash/releases/tag/premium) 解压保存为/usr/local/bin/clash 设置为systemd deamon 编辑/lib/systemd/system/clash.service 1#/lib/systemd/system/clash.service 2 3Description=A rule based proxy tunnel in Go 4After=network.target 5[Service] 6Type=simple 7Restart=on-abort 8ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/clash 9[Install] 10WantedBy=multi-user.target 默认运行目录为~/.config/clash, config.yaml要存放在工作目录中 1systemctl daemon-reload 2systemctl enable clash 二. 透明代理 开启ipv4/ipv6的转发 1echo "net.ipv4.ip_forward = 1" >> /etc/sysctl.conf && sysctl -p 2echo "net.ipv6.conf.all.forwarding = 1" >> /etc/sysctl.conf && sysctl -p 关闭systemd-resolved 服务, 让clash dns占有53端口 systemctl disable systemd-resolved /etc/reslov.conf里我是设置为主路由(ros)的dns iptables持久化 1apt install iptables-persistent netfilter-persistent 2netfilter-persistent save 3netfilter-persistent start 4iptables-save > /etc/iptables/rules.
